app.title: Taiwan Bus
about.title: About
about.name: Taiwan Bus
help.title: How to Use
help.intro: Find nearby bus stops and view real-time arrivals across 22 cities in Taiwan.
help.feature1: Route Schedule: Select origin/destination stops with ETA at each stop
help.feature2: Nearby Stops: Real-time arrivals sorted by distance from your location
help.feature3: Interactive map with stop markers (tap to view arrivals)
help.feature4: Bilingual support (English/繁體中文) for all 22 Taiwan cities
feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what you think, report a bug, or suggest an improvement...
